strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple production platforms
Strong software craftsmanship background including TDD, CI/CD, and clean architecture practices
Exposure to AI/LLM tooling, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes deployments
concerns: Seniority mismatch — candidate is Staff/Senior level applying for an entry-level junior/mid role
Located in Lagos, Nigeria while the role requires high on-site presence
Limited explicit PostgreSQL and Nest.js experience (background leans MongoDB and other frameworks)
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise well beyond the technical bar of this junior/mid role, with strong TypeScript, React, Node.js, and architectural experience plus bonus AI and cloud exposure. However, the position is explicitly entry-level and requires high on-site presence, while the candidate is a Staff-level engineer based in Lagos, Nigeria, creating significant alignment concerns around seniority expectations, compensation fit, and physical presence requirements.
